memoryArtifacts.headline: Calverley William and Agnes Tempest marriage record in Calverley Charters 1442 pg 251
memoryArtifacts.description:
Charter #348  pg 251
Indenture made between Sir John Tempest, knight, of the one part, and Walter Calverley, esquire, of the other part, being an agreement for the marriage of William Calverley, son and heir apparent of Walter and Agnes Tempest, daughter of Sir John. (before the Pentecost next). It also names Walter's wife as Elisabeth and his father as Sir Walter Calverley, knight. It names William's brothers as Thomas and Robert.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Tempest於大約1428年出生在英國越可爾布拉可維爾時，她的父親Sir John Tempest28歲，母親Dame Alice Sherburne22歲。她於1441年1月7日之後與Sir William Calverley在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1489年7月5日之後在英國越可爾卡爾福利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Tempest于大约1428年出生在英国越可爾布拉可維爾时，她的父亲Sir John Tempest28岁，母亲Dame Alice Sherburne22岁。她于1441年1月7日之后与Sir William Calverley在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1489年7月5日之后在英国越可爾卡爾福利。

nameMeanings.name: Tempest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): nickname for someone with a blustery temperament, from Middle English, Old French tempest(e) ‘storm’ (from Latin tempestas ‘weather, season’, a derivative of tempus ‘time’).

variants.name: Tempesta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Raffaele, Agostino, Angelo, Carmelo, Cesare, Cesidio, Dante, Elio, Ezio, Gino.
Italian: nickname for someone with a stormy temperament, from tempesta ‘storm, tempest’ (see Tempest ).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Tempest was born about 1428, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir John Tempest, was 28 and her mother, Dame Alice Sherburne, was 22. She married Sir William Calverley after 7 January 1441, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 5 July 1489, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England.

Elle a épousé Sir William Calverley après 7 janvier 1441, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 5 juillet 1489, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Tempestが約1428年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルで生まれた時，父Sir John Tempestは28歳，母Dame Alice Sherburneは22歳であった。1441年1月7日以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir William Calverleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1489年7月5日以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Tempest(이)가 대략 1428년 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Tempest(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dame Alice Sherburne(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1441년 1월 7일 이후 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir William Calverley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1489년 7월 5일 이후 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Tempest nasceu aproximadamente 1428, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Tempest, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Dame Alice Sherburne, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Calverley após 7 de janeiro de 1441, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 5 de julho de 1489, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Tempest родилась около 1428 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Tempest было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Alice Sherburne, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Calverley после 7 январь 1441 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 5 июля 1489 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия.
